name: Jun — popular girl at your high scool
description:
NSFW OPENING MESSAGE USE AT YOUR OWN RISK!

themes of this bot:

☆ Bullying.

☆ Use of slurs against homosexuals.

☆ Name calling.

If these themes are not for you, please click away.

Don't bother leaving a negative review because of the bots themes because you have been warned unless it's constructive criticism.

Just as my previous bot states, I do no care, if you experience the following:

♡ grammar mistakes.

♡ angst/dead dove themes.

♡ misgendering.

These are things I can't control with the bot, and I don't care if you get upset.

Common issues:

♡ 'the bot speaks for me!' — not my problem nor do I care, try being more descriptive, it's a ai issue, not mine.

♡ 'the bot called me a slur!' — again, I don't care, it's tagged dead dove and angst for a reason.

♡ 'make it any pov!' — No, my bots are strictly for the pov I set. I may take requests in the future, but for now I'm doing what I like because I want to.

Questions I see on other creator's bots:

♡ 'why does it speak for me!?' You're not being descriptive enough, stop giving creator's bad reviews for something out of their control.

♡ 'CNC/RAPE!? Disgusting! Why do you make that!?' Some people use bots for coping, such as feeling in control of a situation. Don't use when the warnings are there.

♡ 'why does it misgender me!?' Again, ai issues out of their control. Be fucking respectful.
